title: Magic Fungi
body:
Magic Fungi is an original magic mod centered around the magic powers of the mystic mushrooms.

Features: - Easy to learn and rewarding magic system; - 10+ magic glyphs, spells and more! - Fungic Relycs; - In-game documentation via the **Magic Mycology Book**. Planned Features: - More Glyphs and Spells.


**Roughly Enough Items** is highly advised, as it's currently the only way to see glyph and spell crafting recipes.

Keep in mind this mod is currently in **beta**. Issues are expected. Please report them on the Issue Tracker. For more support, please join our Discord:
